fearGreedIndex.label: Extreme Fear
fearGreedIndex.note: CNN F&G Index estimated; site inaccessible. Based on prior trajectory (27→28→30→25) and macro context (Brent nearing $100, tankers struck, futures -60bps).

newPosts.title: TMTB Morning Wrap (ADBE Earnings; NNARR Miss)
newPosts.summary: ADBE -8% pre-market on NNARR miss and CEO transition uncertainty. AI monetization story intact but execution risk elevated. Futures +40bps, oil -2%, BTC +3%.

newPosts.title: TMTB Morning Wrap (MELI JPMorgan Downgrade)
newPosts.summary: JPMorgan downgrades MELI to Neutral, cuts PT to $2,100. Brent nearing $100 as 2 tankers struck in Iraqi waters. Futures -60bps. Asia broadly red.

newPosts.title: When War Starts Reaching Business Decisions
newPosts.summary: Geopolitical conflict is now directly affecting SMB decision-making — slower project closings, frozen marketing budgets, deferred hiring. Flexibility is the new competitive advantage.

newPosts.title: You Built an AI Memory System. Now Your Agent Needs Hands.
newPosts.summary: Third in AI agent architecture series. Memory without execution is a filing cabinet. Introduces 'agent hands' — integrations that allow agents to act, not just retrieve.

newPosts.title: Pull Up Your Calendar. 60% of It Is Coordination Tax.
newPosts.summary: AI doesn't just automate tasks — it eliminates the coordination overhead that generates those tasks. 60-70% of knowledge work is coordination tax that agents will eliminate.

newPosts.title: Progressive Planet ($PLAN.V) FINS Review
newPosts.summary: Revisits Progressive Planet (TSX-V: PLAN), a Canadian materials company producing SCM from volcanic rock — a lower-carbon alternative to Portland cement.

newPosts.title: SWI Manual (February 2026)
newPosts.summary: February 2026 portfolio and process documentation. Covers position sizing, conviction management, and maintaining discipline during high-volatility macro environments.

newPosts.title: The Winners of the Resources Shock (Part 2)
newPosts.summary: Identifies structural winners of a sustained resources shock: uranium, copper, and North American energy infrastructure. Supply chain rewiring will take 12-18 months to unwind even in de-escalation.

macroOverview.keyRisk: Geopolitical premium in oil is now structural. Two tankers struck in Iraqi waters. Brent nearing $100.

keyThemes: AI Infrastructure is Real: ORCL RPO $553B (+325% y/y), OCI +81% — AI capex cycle not slowing
Coordination Tax Elimination: AI will eliminate 60-70% of knowledge work overhead, not just automate tasks
Geopolitical Premium is Structural: Two tankers struck, Brent nearing $100, Chinese refiners canceling cargoes
SaaS Contrarianism: Sleep Well and Citrini buying the SaaS sell-off — VEEV, MELI, SE at historically cheap multiples
